name: ai_usage
title: AI Usage
description: Append-only per-turn AI cost record: tokens and cost for one /api/ai/chat call. Written server-side by the chat handler itself (never by the client) so cost recording is authoritative -- a caller cannot omit or falsify it the way it could a client-written shell_commands row. cost_cents is null when no ai_prices row matched; tokens are always recorded regardless.

fields.name: owner_id
fields.label: Owner
fields.help: The user who made the chat call

fields.name: cost_cents
fields.label: Cost (cents)
fields.help: Null when no ai_prices row matched (provider, model) -- tokens are still recorded
